_note: Baselined dependency advisories for the CI dependency-audit gate (issue #22). Keyed by GHSA ID. The gate fails only on critical/high advisories NOT listed here. To ACCEPT a new finding: add it with a reason + accepted_on date under security-engineer review. To mark RESOLVED: remove its entry once the dependency is bumped. Optional review_spec (the tracking spec that will resolve it) and review_by (ISO date) mark a time-boxed acceptance: past review_by the gate warns on every run and FAILS the nightly scheduled re-audit, so a slipped fix goes loud instead of silent. A review_spec with review_by:null is flagged pending until the tracking spec has a target date.
